DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ISSAM KASSIS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO PROVIDE WRITTEN RESPONSES TO AMENDED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; COMPELLING DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE WRITTEN RESPONSES TO AMENDED REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS; DEEMING MATTERS ADMITTED TO THE AMENDED REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS; AND TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IS HEARD THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO OPPOSITION FILED THE COURT ADOPTS ISTS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO AMENDED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED AS IT IS UNOPPOSED. DEFENDANT TO SERVE VERIFIED ANSWERS TO AMENDED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. DEFENDANT TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. RESPONSE TO BE IN COMPLIANCE WITH C.C. P. SECTION 2031.210-230 MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS IT IS UNOPPOSED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1060.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. 302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Provide Written Responses To Amended Special Interrogatories; Compelling Defendant To Provide Written Responses To Amended Requests For Production And To Produce Responsive Documents; Deeming Matters Admitted To The Amended Requests For Admissions; And To Pay Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPERANCES:
Christopher A. Dewys, Esq., of Danfoura Law Offices appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
(415) 970 8012

PLAINTIFF ISSAM KASSIS' Motion For Order To Provide Written Responses To Amended Special Interrogatories; Compelling Defendant To Provide Written Responses To Amended Requests For Production And To Produce Responsive Documents; Deeming Matters Admitted To The Amended Requests For Admissions; And To Pay Monetary Sanctions is heard this day. There being no opposition filed the Court adopts ists Tentative Ruling.

Motion to compel responses to amended special interrogatories and requests for production of documents is granted as it is unopposed. Defendant to serve verified answers to amended special interrogatories within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to serve verified responses and produce documents to requests for production of documents within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Response to be in compliance with C.C. P. Section 2031.210-230
Motion to have requests for admissions be deemed admitted is granted as it is unopposed.
Request for sanctions granted in the amount of $1060.00.
Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported. 302/JPT
